title: Scape and Run: Origins
description: Adds origins based on mobs from Scape and Run: Parasites
body:
## Descrption
With my combined love for the two mods Scape and Run: Parasites and Origins, I decided to merge the two concepts into one. I plan to add almost all parasite mobs into this mod, with due time. Currently, you can become a Buglin/Rupter/Mangler, Assimilated/Thrall, and all Primitives. I also added a new type of origin to pick: Variants. Things like Beserker, Virulent, Breacher, and a few more that I added myself.

## Origins/Plans
For more information on the origins themselves, what they do, and what to expect next, visit the Wiki. (when I write it...)

## Help/Support/Suggestions
Join the discord, or alternatively, submit a bug report/suggestion through the wiki.

## Credits
Thank you to the following:
- Dhanatry, Sereath (SRP Authors/Devs)
- Sandwich Horror (SRP Author)
- Rotch Gwylt (SRP Sound Designer)
- Vinnelli, Pecora, Carver, MoonlitLamps, Skarrier (SRP Texture Artists)

(All of the people mentioned above have been credited within the mod as well)

By asking them directly via their discord, I have been given [express permission](https://imgur.com/liIEw5d) to use some of the assets within this mod.
